top_signals.title: GitHub investigates internal repositories breach claimed by TeamPCP
top_signals.summary: GitHub is investigating a breach of its internal repositories after the TeamPCP hacker group claimed to have accessed approximately 4,000 repositories containing private code. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
